pi_items.source: Task scripts do not enforce or reference any specific occupation.
Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly creates and deploys pods into the 'critical-path' and 'background-tasks' namespaces.
Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly creates the QoS policy document at this exact path.
Verified via verifier.py which explicitly requires a minimum score of 75 to return passed=True.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Kubernetes configurations injected by setup scripts. It has been verified that the target namespaces are 'critical-path' and 'background-tasks', the policy document is generated at '/home/ga/Desktop/qos_policy.md', and the verifier logic strictly requires a score of 75 or higher to pass.
